meaning: vt.以麻梳梳理,激烈质问,诘问,集中质问n.麻梳
examples: The offending comment was in fact a heckle from an audience member.
He went to heckle at their meetings.
A small group of youths stayed behind to heckle and shout abuse.
Collins, who is a free agent, said he doesn't mind if fans heckle him.
But it's not just the folks at these town halls who have learned how to heckle.
